title: The system must be cost-effective.
description: The system costs less than all other touch projectors in the market, enabling users to run the system with their available hardware (PC-Camera-projector) with no hardware limitations at all.

title: The system must be accessible to many users.
description: The system is designed to be affordable and accessible to many users.

title: The system must be flexible.
description: The system can work effectively in different places.

title: The system must be secure.
description: The system stores account information of the user in an account database.

title: The system must be user-friendly.
description: The system provides an interactive surface controlled remotely with just hand gestures.
